# v0.1.18

## Highlights

- Fixed recurring `context_budget` blocks during multi-turn chat by auto-expanding the default per-turn budget when users have not set a hard `--budget`.
- Added chat-native skill operations: `/skills list`, `/skills show <id>`, `/skills inspect <id>`, `/skills recommend <task>`, `/skills market-list`, and `/skills install <id>`.
- Preserved strict behavior for explicit budgets: if users pass `--budget`, over-budget runs still stop instead of silently expanding.

## Verification

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
